key_points: Manufacturing industries help modernize agriculture by providing machinery and fertilizers
Industries are classified based on raw materials, ownership, size and use
Iron and steel industry is called the backbone of industrial development
Aluminium is lightweight, corrosion resistant and a good conductor
examples: Jute industries are concentrated along the Hugli River
Iron and steel industries are located in the Chhotanagpur plateau
Bengaluru is known for IT and electronics industries
Automobile industries manufacture cars, trucks and buses
formulas: Steel production raw material ratio = Iron ore : Coking coal : Limestone = 4 : 2 : 1
Industrial development = Raw materials + Power + Transport + Labour
exam_tips: Understand why industries develop in specific locations
Learn properties and uses of aluminium
Know factors responsible for growth of automobile industry
Remember causes of different types of industrial pollution
